title: [spec-compliance] imprecise CBOR comment in lichen-coap/option.rs
description: lichen-coap/src/option.rs:31 comment says CBOR=60 "used for SenML-CBOR (RFC 7049)" but SenML uses 112 (SENML_CONTENT_FORMAT per constants.toml:81, appendix-senml.md:16, spec/07-transport-app.md:358). 60 is generic application/cbor. Minor but should be corrected for accuracy as part of constant/spec alignment. No wire impact but violates precise spec matching. Line 34 has correct 112 for SenML.
